stories.title: 'He's us -- except he's very good at basketball': ...
stories.summary: Brunson's appeal in New York centers around one idea: People might appreciate glitz and glamour -- but they respect guts and guile even more.

stories.title: The Knicks solved their minutes puzzle just in tim...
stories.summary: Here's how New York embraced its bench and overcame one of its biggest obstacles to a title.

stories.title: Sorsby granted injunction, eligible to play in '26...
stories.summary: Texas Tech star quarterback Brendan Sorsby has been granted a temporary injunction against the NCAA and will be eligible to play for the Red Raiders in 2026.

stories.title: Aiyuk appears to imply 49ers 'scared' to cut him
stories.summary: Brandon Aiyuk posted a video to Instagram on Sunday, appearing to imply that the 49ers are afraid to release him because he could land elsewhere and eventually make them regret letting him go.

stories.title: Chiefs reunite with CB Sneed 2 years after trade
stories.summary: The Chiefs are signing cornerback L'Jarius Sneed, his agents, the Katz Brothers, told ESPN's Adam Schefter.
